501 TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_DSCHRG_CD TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Trouble concentrating on things: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient expressed trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television. 0 = No
